titleStmt.title: SII 6.240: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 240. (A.R. No. 265-B of 1897). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇīyyuṇḍa¨rtthijanasēvyuṇḍu
bhavyuṇḍu divyamū¨rtti śau[¨ryyā]rabhaṭī
naṭā niśitāśividāritaśa
truva[¨rggu]ṇā vāritabandhumitraja
natāmaṇi goṁkkanarēṁdrumaṁtrivro
tsārītalōcaṇḍu pravritasatvuṇḍu brō
laṇḍu dhanyuṇḍunnatini . śrīrājavrō
liśāsanu ṇḍārādhitanīlakaṇṭhuṇḍa
bhinavamadanā kāruṇḍu vrōlaṇḍu
vibudhā dhāruṇḍanaṁ cannamāṁba tama
yuṇḍu negaḍenu . Ātanivallabhigo
mmama mātaṁggamarālayānaThe syllables yāna are engraved below the line.manasijura
tivi khyātayaśōnidhigoṁkkama hī
talapatikaruṇa lakṣmi neṁttayu ve
lasenu . cāruviśuddhavaṁśa dadhisāga
rasaṁbhavitēṁddulēkhala kṣmīrucitāṁgga bha
kti nupamiṁppa satītvaguṇaprasiddhime
yi nāraya sejjaprōlani kulāṁgganaṁ
gommama mēlu sītakunu vārijaba
ndhukāṁtakunu vāsavukāṁttaku lakṣmīdē
vikini . Aṁbaramū¨rttikhēṁdumitamai
sakavatsaramul sanaṁgga bhūmyaṁbu
divākarātmakalayāṁttaku bhakti nakha
ṇḍamaina dīpaṁbamarēśvarā¨rtthamuga bā
laki lōlaviśālanētri gommāṁbika
nilpe baktimatiyai yeṟiyāṁbata
nūja prītitōnu . svasti . samastapraśa
stisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara ku
lōttuṁggacōḍagoṁkkarājula divyaśrī
pādapadmōpajīviyaina sejjaprōlenā
yakuni peṇḍlamu vaṇṭhala kommāsā
ni śrīmadamarēśvaramahādēvara kā
caṁdrā¨rkkatāra makhaṁḍava¨rttidīpaṁbuna
kiccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni
koṇḍapaḍumaṭilōni Enmulamaṁdda
ka gaḍiyabōyuṇḍu dana puThe
Digital edition of SII 6.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
